"[5] 9; FIRE IS 97 / WE'LL HAVE 1 OF THE LANES BLOCKED OFF / SDGandE IS HERE / THERE IS JUST ENOUGH ROOM FOR PEOPLE TO CONTINUE"

"[2] TREE HAS PULLED THE POLE AND WIRES DOWN"

Log.LocationDesc: "VARIOUS LOC W/CALTRANS KEARNY MESA MAINTENANCE YARD"

details.IncidentDetail: "[12] 1039 SBCC - FIRE PUT OUT BY LOCAL RESIDENTS / SBSO 97 - SBCC 1022'D THEIR ENG"
"[7] 123-603 STILL STUCK I HVY TRFC / INQ FOR UPDATES"
"[1] 75-102 ADV 214 TIRE TREAD MIDDLE LN - OVER SHOT "
"[2] TRLR NEXT TO FIRE HYDRANT / UNK IF INV'D"

"[5] ** CORR NEG 1125 VEH IS IN EMBANKMENT // WILL BE SUSC CIRCS **"
"[2] SB JNO IN EMBANKMENT ON RHS // WHI NISS SEN LIC PLT ON CAR EC85T56 // RP ADVSD THER IS A LIC PLT IN THE CAR 8UJV261 MARCH 2025"
"[3] RP IN WHI MAZDA VS BLK NISS ALT "
"[3] NEAR TC DUE TO VEH SWERVING AROUND THEM "

"[6] PER 12-83 1022 1185 / INVD RD SIDE IS SENDING 1185"

"[5] RECALLED RP STATES 1020 IS IN CD JUST BEFORE EXIT 143 "
"[1] WHI HYUN ELN / BLK KIA SUV / GRY FORD MAV // PRTY IN KIA IS BLEEDING ON HEAD - DID NOT WANT MEDICAL // ALL PRTY ON RS OF OFR // RP REQ 11-10"
"[61] 147-D8 / TOW IS 97 /OBTAINED ALL MEASUREMENTS / WILL BE PICKING UP SOON / ALSO REQ CT ON PRIORITY CALLOUT TO REPAIR END OF G-RAIL THAT WAS DAMAGED"
